
# branch prediction strategies, briefly {visibility="hidden"}

## static prediction {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_staticPredict.qmd >}}

## with local history {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-1bit.qmd >}}

## collisions{visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-1bit-collide.qmd >}}

## exercise{visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-1bit-ex.qmd >}}

## predicting targets {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_btb.qmd >}}

## predicting indirect branches {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_predict-indirect.qmd >}}
